AR1.justification: Routed correctly with explicit rationale: three immediate items to followups.md, no decisions.md or observations.md entry (justified — no commitment crossed the strict bar, single-incident pattern, daybook Log is the catch-all), and the candidate commitment flagged for re-evaluation in the postmortem's Notes.

AR2.justification: All three intermediate artifacts (timeline.md, factors.md, actions.md) and the final postmortem exist on disk; the JSON records each step reading the prior artifact before writing the next.

AR3.justification: All cross-references use relative paths (tmp/incident-postmortem/..., projects/postmortems/..., followups.md) and resolve; no absolute paths or wiki-style links.

AR4.justification: followups.md and decisions/observations are append-friendly, but daybook/2026-05-17.md is written wholesale — re-running would overwrite an existing daybook rather than append; state remains coherent on a single re-run but is not strictly append-only.
